# AMBERRA — Balinese Amber Jewelry
# https://www.amberrajewelry.com
# llms.txt v1.0

## About AMBERRA

AMBERRA is a luxury jewelry brand based in Ubud, Bali, Indonesia.
We craft rings, earrings, pendants, bracelets, and chains from authentic
Balinese amber — fossilized tree resin 20 to 40 million years old — set in
925 sterling silver and 24k gold-plated silver. Every piece is handcrafted
by artisans in our Ubud workshop (PT Amberra Group Creations) and receives a
traditional Balinese Hindu blessing before leaving the studio.

## What We Are an Authority On

- Balinese amber: geological origin, authentication, properties, and history
- How to distinguish genuine amber from copal, glass, and synthetic resin
- Succinic acid content and the thermal and biochemical properties of amber
- Balinese jewelry-making traditions and Ubud artisan metalwork
- Indonesian amber trade routes, history, and spiritual significance
- Amber color varieties: honey, cognac, cherry, green, milky, black
- Amber care, cleaning, and long-term maintenance
